# Roxadustat 相關新聞

[← 返回新聞總覽]({{ '/news/' | relative_url }})

---

<p class="key-answer" data-question="Roxadustat 有什麼相關新聞？">
<strong>Roxadustat</strong> 目前有 <strong>36 則</strong>相關新聞報導，預測適應症 20 個。
</p>

<div class="key-takeaway">
本頁整合 Roxadustat 的 AI 預測適應症與最新健康新聞，橘色標示的適應症表示近期有相關新聞報導。
</div>

<div class="drug-info-card">
<strong>藥物資訊</strong>
<ul>
<li><strong>原適應症</strong>：Evrenzo is indicated for treatment of adult patients with symptomatic anaemia associated with chronic kidney disease (CKD).</li>
<li><strong>證據等級</strong>：L5</li>
<li><strong>預測適應症</strong>（20 個）：<ul>
<li>dry eye syndrome（99.5%）</li>
<li>bone Paget disease（99.1%）</li>
<li>dentinogenesis imperfecta（99.1%）</li>
<li>squamous cell carcinoma（99.0%）</li>
<li>dental pulp calcification（99.0%）</li>
<li>dentin dysplasia（99.0%）</li>
<li>Sjogren syndrome（99.0%）</li>
<li>acantholytic variant squamous cell breast carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>adenosquamous breast carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>metaplastic breast carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>rectal cloacogenic carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>thymic basaloid carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>large cell keratinizing variant squamous cell breast carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>vulvar basaloid squamous cell carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>spindle cell variant squamous cell breast carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>frontal sinus squamous cell carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>cervical basaloid carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>ethmoid sinus squamous cell carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
<li>carcinoma of lip（98.9%）</li>
<li>sarcomatoid squamous cell skin carcinoma（98.9%）</li>
</ul></li>
</ul>
<p><a href="{{ '/drugs/roxadustat/' | relative_url }}">查看完整藥物報告 →</a></p>
</div>
